description: App version driver is a component that drives the content of the string field provided to ``Text`` to Resonite's version.

fields.Text: Drives the provided text field's content to Resonite's version. The text is formatted starting with "Beta", "Alpha", or "Release", followed by the game's compile date. The date is formatted ``year.day.month.minuteOfDay``. Minute of day is the minutes since midnight. The time is in UTC.
